svg.aria-label: Five small step-response panels left to right by increasing corrective strength: too weak settles short, good reaches the target cleanly, too strong overshoots, then sustained oscillation, then runaway divergence leaving the frame, beneath a corrective-strength arrow
svg.title: Five small step-response panels left to right by increasing corrective strength: too weak settles short, good reaches the target cleanly, too strong overshoots, then sustained oscillation, then runaway divergence leaving the frame, beneath a corrective-strength arrow
svg.text: One knob, five fates: the correction spectrum
